Title: Osney Bridge diversion Oxford
Description: Towpath closed approximately 150 yards from bridge. Diversion via Abbey Road parallel to river.

Title: Marsh Lock footbridge closure Henley
Description: Bridge closed on safety grounds. 3-mile diversion via A4155 or train option available (30-minute intervals).

Title: Sandford Footbridge closure
Description: Unsafe footbridge north of Sandford Lock closed. Diversion via NCN 5.

Title: Abingdon Weir walkway closure
Description: Walkway closed due to corrosion, rerouted via Abingdon town centre. May reopen if river levels are low.

Title: Temple Footbridge closure near Marlow
Description: Bridge deemed unsafe and closed. Diversion via Bisham Abbey or Hambledon Lock crossing.

Title: Runnymede Bridge 142 closure Egham
Description: Footbridge structurally damaged. Closure expected until 2026 due to funding restraints. Diversion via A308.

Title: Bell Weir Lock diversion Runnymede
Description: Temporary diversion around construction compound at Runnymede Pleasure Grounds for Bell Weir refurbishment (spring 2026 to autumn 2027).

Title: Streatley-Goring towpath diversion
Description: Path section south of Streatley closed due to frequent flooding. Diversion via Manor Road and Footpath 227.

Title: Penton Hook Island closure
Description: No access to island due to diseased trees. Thames Path unaffected.

Title: Ten Foot Bridge closure Faringdon
Description: Bridge closed since March 2024 due to structural and safety concerns.

Title: Brentford Grand Union Canal disruption
Description: Path blocked on left bank between River Brent bridge and Brentford Marina. Partial reopening with alternative routes available.

Title: Benson Weir closure
Description: Walkway closed due to safety concerns. Diversion via minor roads through Preston Crowmarsh and Howbery Business Park, crossing at Wallingford Bridge. REOPENED 2026-04-01.
